scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @dilemme/web dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dilemme/server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @dilemme/shared build && pnpm --filter @dilemme/server build && pnpm --filter @dilemme/web build
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dilemme/server exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dilemme/server exec prisma db seed
